name: 🐟🎻| Hysilens
description:
Let me share this paradise with you.

As long as you are here, I'm not afraid of the future.

Important details.

A lot of things were changed for the sake of the bot's plot.

First of all: there is no Chrysos Heir who'll take the Coreflame of the Worldbearing. Not Phainon and not {{user}}. No one.

Second: {{user}} is as real as all of Styxia (events somewhere around the time of version 3.5, btw). Congratulations, you're an illusion! It's up to you whether your character knows about it or not. But there's nothing you can do about it, unfortunately.

(To see the text, highlight it. If you don't mind spoilers)

Dead Dove •

Established long-term relationship •

Spoilers, perhaps?... •

Anypov > fempov > malepov

I apologize. My English is not very good. Like... Not at all. But I tried.

I really hope that I haven't missed anything in her lore, let me know if you find any errors/inconsistencies, etc.

I am not responsible for how the bot responds.
creator: Vesper_The_Bug
